entry.title: 10 new items added to SAP Activate for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition for 2408 release
entry.content:
In this blog post, we want to share the 10 highlights of the methodology content enhancements in SAP Activate for deployment of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition that were recently published for the 2408 release update. Note that you can find an approximately 5-minute video showing a demo of all these enhancements at the bottom of this post.

1. Initial Admin User/Technical Administrator

You will find a new task that covers the verification of the Initial Admin/Technical Administrator, including defining their role, outlining steps to identify the suitable candidate, introducing a new user onboarding token process, guiding on creating and using SAP Universal IDs and managing cloud notification subscriptions on behalf of others. You can access the here - Verify Initial Admin/Technical Administrator. See more details about the task in the image below.

2. New Bundled Provisioning Process

A new task has been created to streamline the process of requesting initial system access for SAP S/4HANA Cloud and related systems, including SAP Cloud ALM tenant, SAP Central Business Configuration tenant, and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Starter System. Requests are managed through SAP for Me, initiated by the initial Admin User, who subsequently receives access instructions via email. Bundled Provisioning allows partners and customers to request access to multiple system tenants in a single request for enhanced efficiency. You can access the task here - Request Initial System Access of SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

3. Grant Access to Partner for Creating and Managing Cases

A new SAP Activate task explains granting SAP implementation partners access to create and manage cases for customers on their behalf. The procedure, detailed in SAP Note 2518600, outlines steps to follow using SAP for Me, enabling authorization for service partners (S-users) to provide support services. You can access the task here Grant Access to Partner for Creating and Managing Cases.

4. Data Migration Updates

The recent updates emphasize the importance of downtime and restriction windows in data migration, ensuring minimal business disruption. A new accelerator, Software Lifecycle Management, was added to support data migration tasks in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition development environment. Additionally, the Hotfix Collection Deployment Restrictions.pdf accelerator was introduced for the SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit task, offering guidance on deploying hotfixes. Additional content updates were made to enhance support for data migration via direct transfer, and general procedure updates improved readability and usability, aiming to streamline the migration process and enhance user comprehension. You can find the updated content in the following tasks:

  • Execute Data Migration in the Development Tenant of SAP S/4HANA Cloud
  • Self-Enable on SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit
  • Execute Data Migration in the Development Tenant of SAP S/4HANA Cloud

5. Organizational Change Management (OCM) with SAP Activate

A comprehensive review of the Organizational Change Management (OCM) content included new and rework of many deliverables, tasks and accelerators. In addition, a new Organizational Change Management tag has been created that includes 7 accelerators in Discover phase attached to task Organizational Change Management Overview; 12 accelerators in Prepare phase assigned to following tasks:

  • Change Concept
  • Change Plan
  • Stakeholder Analysis
  • Communication Analysis and Plan

an accelerator in Explore phase assigned to task Communication Plan Execution; 4 accelerators in the Realize phase assigned to the task Detailed Change Impact Analysis. 
Additionally, you can find a standalone comprehensive methodology roadmap for Organizational Change Management in SAP Activate Roadmap Viewer.

6. Lifecycle Events and Hotfix Collection

The SAP Activate methodology updates for lifecycle events include adding tasks to the Release and Update Cycle deliverable, covering three key lifecycle events: Review and Process Hotfix Collection, Evaluate and Activate Feature from Continuous Delivery, and Prepare and Process Upgrade. These tasks streamline lifecycle management, and the SAP Activate for Upgrade of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (3-system landscape) roadmap is now linked to the Prepare and Process Upgrade task, offering a structured guide for handling upgrades in a 3-system landscape.

The Review and Process Hotfix Collection task was updated to include references to several key accelerators: Software Lifecycle Management for Customers, Upgrade & Maintenance Schedule, and Hotfix Collection Deployment Restrictions. These updates provide users with comprehensive guidance on managing hotfix collections effectively. You can access them on the following tasks:

  • Software Lifecycle Management for Customers
  • Upgrade & Maintenance Schedule
  • Hotfix Collection Deployment Restrictions

 

7. Parallel Project Line

The enhancements for customers in the early adopter program for parallel project lines allow for a clear separation of incremental configuration activities from the “main line,” enabling the productive environment to remain up-to-date with the latest software releases. After validation, new configurations can be merged back into the main line and transported to the productive environment. These enhancements also include features for managing development and test environments, copying master data for data migration testing, and copying automated testing scripts. You can access this content in a dedicated SAP Activate methodology for parallel project lines early adopters here. If you want to see only the tasks that have been adjusted for this new functionality, access Parallel Project Line tag to display these tasks.

8. SAP Activate Methodology for SAP Business Technology Platform

The SAP Activate Methodology for SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) provides implementation guidelines for customers deploying BTP-based solutions. It includes phases, deliverables, and tasks following the SAP Activate framework, with accelerators linked to relevant tasks for easy access. Deliverables and tasks are listed sequentially, though some may need to be parallelized for efficiency. This roadmap will be rolled out in phases, starting with a focus on governance and key implementation milestones, and later expanding to specialized areas like App Development, Automation, Integration, Data & Analytics, and AI.

9. SAP Activate for Conversion of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2-system to 3-system landscape

The SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition roadmap for converting from a 2-system to a 3-system landscape has been updated with insights from customer conversions using both CBC and Solution Builder-based systems. Key updates include setting up transport management for business continuity, revised self-enablement activities, and the addition of a new accelerator highlighting delta features for the landscape conversion. A Customer Conversion Checklist accelerator and a new SAP Community accelerator for the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Three-System Landscape, have also been introduced to support the conversion process.

10. Find Roadmap Viewer from Google and Bing Searches and access it from SAP for Me

Watch the video below to see how to access SAP Activate methodology content from your SAP for Me screen. It adds to the searching for the SAP Activate content on traditional search engines like Google Search or Microsoft Bing.

You can view the demo of there 10 enhancements in the video following this link - https://sapvideo.cfapps.eu10-004.hana.ondemand.com/?entry_id=1_djrp3uui

 

Watch the Replays of Our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 Early Release Series!

From July 8 to July 12, we hosted a series of 20 compelling live sessions to highlight the exciting innovations shipped with the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 release. Did you miss the live sessions? We've got you covered! Take advantage of the entire series or pick and choose the sessions most relevant to you. Don't miss this chance and watch them on demand–anywhere, anytime.

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud – Allocations Management Migration Update
entry.content:
With QRC1 2024, we restricted the usage of the legacy Allocation Designer for designing new allocation processes and offered a manual migration path to data actions (more details can be found here). Continuing our product journey of gradually discontinuing the legacy Allocation Designer and running structured allocation processes as an integral part of data actions, we reached the next milestone of automatically migrating all legacy allocations to data actions.  

QRC3 - Important Updates Coming

With the SAP Analytics Cloud upgrade to QRC3, the legacy allocation processes and steps will be automatically copied and migrated to data actions, facilitating an easy transition from the legacy allocation functionality. Using the data actions going forward for defining and executing the structured allocation processes brings additional benefits, such as parameterizable data action triggers, multi-action execution, and automated planning processes (visit SAP help for more details).

The migration will ensure a smooth transition by maintaining the following:

  • The data action representations of the legacy allocations will retain all existing relations between allocation steps, processes and data actions embedded legacy allocations.
  • Each allocation process is copied and migrated to a dedicated data action. Its properties, like name and description, are transferred to this data action for easy retrieval. The process's legacy allocation steps are migrated as data action steps.
  • The legacy allocation steps used multiple times in different allocation processes and/or data actions will be created as nested data actions.
  • The privileges transfer is part of the migration. This means the corresponding created data actions will be governed by the same user- and team- privileges as the original legacy allocations. A Planning Professional license is required to access, edit, and execute data actions. 

The automatically created data actions will be accessible from the newly created Files > My Files > Public > Structured Allocations folder.

Image 1 Migrated legacy allocations

 Note: You will retain view-only access to legacy allocations through the Allocation Legacy Designer. However, editing legacy allocation processes or steps will no longer be possible.

Image 2 Using the Legacy Designer does not allow creating new allocations

Although the execution of legacy allocations is still supported, we strongly advise updating your legacy structured allocation execution workflows. As a reminder, users triggering legacy allocations from stories will receive a notification advising them to transition to data actions.

Image 3 Message displayed upon legacy allocation execution

The final phase of discontinuing legacy allocations is expected with the QRC4 update. Then, we will no longer support the execution of legacy allocations. Please use the automatically migrated data action representations or manually migrate your allocations in the oncoming release period (QRC3 until QRC4) and update your planning workflows accordingly. We plan to retire the legacy designer completely with QRC1 in 2025.

Please use the Commenting section if you have any questions or require assistance with the structure allocations transition to data actions!

entry.title: How to view PO Adobe form in XML format
entry.content:
Hi Team,

How to view Adobe Form in XML format for Purchase order forms, Kindly provide a document on this.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to view PO Adobe form in XML format
entry.content:
Hello!

You can view/extract the XML format of an output form for PO using app Change Purchase Orders - Advance, via the 'Messages' output screen.

Add a new output item and edit the Print Queue to #&&DOWNLOAD_FORM_DATA_XML&&# and then use display document button to show the XML data.

To highlight best practices around this #&&DOWNLOAD_FORM_DATA_XML&&# method to extract XML data, you may refer to below pointers:

  • This works only for applications that have included the standard output control reuse screen in edit mode (for example, Manage Billing Documents, Change Sales Orders -VA02, Change Billing Documents, Change Purchase Orders - Advance, etc).
  • This works only for output items in status 'In Preparation'.
  • The XML always returns the current data of the underlying business document.
  • Does not work for duplicates.
  • The XML does not include data from the master form template.
  • An output with print queue #&&DOWNLOAD_FORM_DATA_XML&&# is not possible.
  • Print queue #&&DOWNLOAD_FORM_DATA_XML&&#Â cannot be used in output parameter determination.

KBA 0002825919 also explains the same.

entry.title: CAP Build with Workspaces and package-lock.json
entry.content:
Hi,

We are starting to use the beta custom build feature of npm Workspaces. Is there an intended approach of dealing with freezing of imported packages?

Without the npm workspaces, this is handled by "cds build" (it copies the package-lock.json file of the CAP project into the gen/srv folder which in turn ensures the build reproduces with the previously used package versions).

With the "cds build --ws-pack" option however, we find that:

  • The package-lock.json file lives in the root of the project structure (i.e. not in the individual workspace folders)
  • When "cds build --ws-pack" is run from within a workspace folder, there is no package-lock.json file copied into the gen/srv folder
  • The resulting deployment package does not resolve the same package versions between builds (it upgrades within the allowed semantic versioning specifications)

We work around this currently using a custom build script like this. It works except if the included workspaces have competing version requirements (i.e. to the root package-lock.json file has something like "subfolder/node_modules/somepackage") - then a mere copy of the package-lock.json file does not solve it.

#!/bin/bash -e
npx cds build --ws-pack --production
# Include the top-level package-lock file
cp ../package-lock.json gen/srv

Is there any intended approach or advice on this? The npm workspace feature will be very useful, thanks for the work going into it!

Regards

//Carl

entry.title: Timeout of 120000ms exceeded, Unable to fulfill proxy request
entry.content:
I'm putting together a CSV import using Build apps, with a Desitination pointing to a python app deployed on BTP.

Everything works fine, until I hit the 120000ms (2 minute) timeout when processing a large file, at which point the Build app throws an error.

Checking the logs, the python app is still working through the file after the 2 minute timeout, and completes fine, it looks to be the BTP DESTINATION itself which is timing out and reporting an error when there is none.

I'm not sure if the issue is down to DESTINATION parameters, or with SAP BUILD apps itself.

What timeout parameters are available to set/try?

I've tried HTML5.Timeout, Timeout, and ClientReadTimeout. Nothing seems to extend anything over 2 mins.

entry.title: Re: SAC Excel MEMERPROPERTY not returning Description
entry.content:
Thank you for your time and help. As FYI, I also submitted a ticket specifically for pulling in a dimension member 'Description' because this is not a custom property. Response received is below. The first option below is what stopped working with Office 365 change (upper case 'D'). I changed to lower case 'd' and works for Users. 
Regards r.a.

--------------------------------
I checked this with Development team and the case is now sorted out.
The KBA 3497065 was updated accordingly.
In summary, we have four scenarios for using Description in the formula.

Below examples work because property description is used and it is not case sensitive:
=SAP.MEMBERPROPERTY( DS_1, "Account" , 0123, "Description")
=SAP.MEMBERPROPERTY( DS_1, "Account" , 0123, "description")

Below example works because property ID is used exactly as it is:
=SAP.MEMBERPROPERTY( DS_1, "Account" , 0123, "[Account].description")

Below example does NOT work because property ID is case sensitive:
=SAP.MEMBERPROPERTY( DS_1, "Account" , 0123, "[Account].Description")

Please check if the above also applies to your case. As per the KBA, we strongly recommend using property ID to retrieve the Description property to allow multiple languages.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: YCOA standard chart of accounts, environment: SAP S4 HANA CLOUD - Partner Demo Customizing?
entry.content: You can create a new account by means of copying it from an existing GL account. There is no way to create a GL account from scratch. Also keep in mind that this master records are transportable, you cannot update the chart of accounts directly in production.

entry.title: Re: YCOA standard chart of accounts, environment: SAP S4 HANA CLOUD - Partner Demo Customizing?
entry.content: Here is the link to the FAQs where you can find the steps to create new accounts and maintain the chart accordingly.https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/87e8b621685f4f8591078b9dc8840b78.html

entry.title: Re: Posting date should be locked and future date should not be accepted in sap public cloud
entry.content: You may be able to leverage the validation app to manage your requirement. However, it really depends on the context you will be running the validation, i.e. is this for posting journal entries, or is this oriented to other applications that integrate with Finance?

entry.title: API: Journal Entry – Clearing (Asynchronous) 問題請教
entry.content:
首先於SAP介面上建立客戶發票(DR)，建立後取得日記帳分錄為1800000008

接著欲使用API「Journal Entry – Clearing (Asynchronous)」達成類似在「過帳收款」頁面的沖帳行為，將部分金額11000結清轉入銀存11030002:

這邊先簡單化，先不考慮手續費問題:

使用官方文件 的Sample Payload for Partial Clearing，參數改成目前測試環境的。

 

<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:sfin="http://sap.com/xi/SAPSCORE/SFIN">
   <soapenv:Header/>
   <soapenv:Body>
      <sfin:JournalEntryBulkClearingRequest>
         <MessageHeader>
            <ID>MSG_20240715_Partial</ID>
            <CreationDateTime>2024-07-15T11:00:00.1234567Z</CreationDateTime>
            <TestDataIndicator>false</TestDataIndicator>
         </MessageHeader>
         <JournalEntryClearingRequest>
            <MessageHeader>
               <ID>MSG_20240715_01</ID>
               <CreationDateTime>2024-07-15T11:00:00.1234567Z</CreationDateTime>
               <TestDataIndicator/>
            </MessageHeader>
            <JournalEntry>
               <CompanyCode>FIVE</CompanyCode>
               <AccountingDocumentType>DZ</AccountingDocumentType>
               <DocumentDate>2024-07-15</DocumentDate>
               <PostingDate>2024-07-15</PostingDate>
               <CurrencyCode>TWD</CurrencyCode>
               <DocumentHeaderText>Clearing API</DocumentHeaderText>
               <CreatedByUser>5STAR API</CreatedByUser>
               <APARItems>
                  <ReferenceDocumentItem>2</ReferenceDocumentItem>
                  <CompanyCode>FIVE</CompanyCode>
                  <AccountType>D</AccountType>
                  <APARAccount>1000000</APARAccount>
                  <FiscalYear>2024</FiscalYear>
                  <AccountingDocument>1800000008</AccountingDocument>
                  <AccountingDocumentItem>1</AccountingDocumentItem>
                  <PartialPaymentAmtInDspCrcy currencyCode="TWD">11000</PartialPaymentAmtInDspCrcy>
               </APARItems>
            </JournalEntry>
         </JournalEntryClearingRequest>
      </sfin:JournalEntryBulkClearingRequest>
   </soapenv:Body>
</soapenv:Envelope>

 

API回傳錯誤訊息如下: 「交易貨幣 TWD  11,000 中的餘額過大無法自動更正」

此問題我認為是沒帶入銀存account，所以修改一下參數，加入GLItems 將銀行總帳科目帶入。

 

<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:sfin="http://sap.com/xi/SAPSCORE/SFIN">
   <soapenv:Header/>
   <soapenv:Body>
      <sfin:JournalEntryBulkClearingRequest>
         <MessageHeader>
            <ID>MSG_20240715_Partial</ID>
            <CreationDateTime>2024-07-15T11:00:00.1234567Z</CreationDateTime>
            <TestDataIndicator>false</TestDataIndicator>
         </MessageHeader>
         <JournalEntryClearingRequest>
            <MessageHeader>
               <ID>MSG_20240715_01</ID>
               <CreationDateTime>2024-07-15T11:00:00.1234567Z</CreationDateTime>
               <TestDataIndicator/>
            </MessageHeader>
            <JournalEntry>
               <CompanyCode>FIVE</CompanyCode>
               <AccountingDocumentType>DZ</AccountingDocumentType>
               <DocumentDate>2024-07-15</DocumentDate>
               <PostingDate>2024-07-15</PostingDate>
               <CurrencyCode>TWD</CurrencyCode>
               <DocumentHeaderText>Clearing API</DocumentHeaderText>
               <CreatedByUser>5STAR API</CreatedByUser>
                <GLItems>
                  <ReferenceDocumentItem>1</ReferenceDocumentItem>
                  <CompanyCode>FIVE</CompanyCode>
                  <GLAccount>11030002</GLAccount>
                  <FiscalYear>2024</FiscalYear>
                  <AccountingDocument>1800000008</AccountingDocument>
                  <AccountingDocumentItem>1</AccountingDocumentItem>
               </GLItems>
               <APARItems>
                  <ReferenceDocumentItem>2</ReferenceDocumentItem>
                  <CompanyCode>FIVE</CompanyCode>
                  <AccountType>D</AccountType>
                  <APARAccount>1000000</APARAccount>
                  <FiscalYear>2024</FiscalYear>
                  <AccountingDocument>1800000008</AccountingDocument>
                  <AccountingDocumentItem>1</AccountingDocumentItem>
                  <PartialPaymentAmtInDspCrcy currencyCode="TWD">11000</PartialPaymentAmtInDspCrcy>
               </APARItems>
            </JournalEntry>
         </JournalEntryClearingRequest>
      </sfin:JournalEntryBulkClearingRequest>
   </soapenv:Body>
</soapenv:Envelope>

 

先不考慮GLItems沒有提供Amount欄位可以輸入金額的問題，我以為她會將DR的11000自動帶入借方銀存科目。

結果得到如下錯誤訊息: 帳戶0011030002中沒有未結項目的管理

問題總結:

  • 今年3月/5月/7月， Journal Entry – Clearing (Asynchronous) 這支API於SAP community中陸續都有人發問相關問題，因此想釐清一下，目前這支API的情況。
  • 請問這支API是本來就不支援過帳收款(DZ)結清客戶發票(DR)的嗎? 還是有什麼設定要做? 或使用方式不對?
  • 請問過帳收款(沖帳)是否有其他備案? 如Excel匯入沖帳。 因為供應商發票是可以透過excel匯入的，若過帳收款也可以，也不一定要走API。
  • 因為我們沖帳帳務資料龐大，未來不太可能手動逐筆結清。

SAP Community 相關問題連結:

  • 2024/07 (3周前) 還有人發問:
    https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/clear-incoming-payments-with-api/qaq-p/13753614
  • 2024/03 還有人追加發問
    https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/guidelines-for-api-journal-entry-clearing-asynchronous/ba-p/13410748
  • 2024/05 還有人追加發問
    https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/post-incoming-payments-with-an-api-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition/qaq-p/12728308
  • 目前沒看到官方有正式回覆

 

以下補充實際需求，需考慮手續費問題:

  • 113/05/01, 113/05/02 立帳資料如下:
  • 如下圖黃底為沖帳資料，於113/05/06欲將5/1, 5/2部分營收沖銷轉入銀存。
  • 5/1營收沖$704，5/2營收沖$11752
  • 手續費共224+19=243
  • 銀存共11271+942=12213

entry.title: Re: In MTO sale order costing do we cost SFG's with CK11N...
entry.content: Hello Gafsar, thanks for reply. my issue is not relevant to cost calculation on FG. If I save sales order cost is calculating for FG and saving it based on the sales order that is perfect no issue. But i am asking about its component SFG cost. SFG is not saving based on sales order. If check in CKM3N also no value is coming for components. My question do i need to run Std. Cost estimate and save cost for SFG's or any way where system saves relevant to sales order

entry.title: SAP ERP公有云 [SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition] 2408 亮点前瞻
entry.content:
随着全球数字化转型的持续推进，企业资源规划（ERP）解决方案也不断演进，以满足日益复杂的商业需求。我们很高兴地宣布，SAP最新版本的公有云ERP解决方案—— SAP ERP公有云2408，已经准备就绪。这一版本代表着SAP在技术创新和业务优化领域的最新成果，为企业在数字化变革中提供了更智能、更高效和更灵活的工具。Cloud ERP PSCC的负责人Bert Schulze也发布了2408的英文博客：SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 Release的亮点。

2408版本通过一系列创新功能和强化改进，持续提升用户体验并优化业务流程。让我们深入了解一下这次更新中的主要亮点。

本次更新涵盖了SAP Cloud ERP PSCC团队总结的亮点，这些成果将进一步增强SAP ERP公有云的功能性和适用性。以下是本版本的一些关键改进和新增功能的简要概述：

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408亮点前瞻：人工智能与技术创新（AI and Technologies）

人工智能与技术创新在优化业务流程，改进决策支持，提高用户体验方面发挥着关键作用。在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408版本中，人工智能和技术创新将带来众多令人期待的亮点功能，用于提升企业运营效率，改变企业应对复杂商业挑战的方式。

本次分享将带来以下内容：

  • SAP Joule in S/4HANA Cloud
  • 用户体验-我的主页
  • 从订单到收款（Order to Cash）的端到端智能流程自动化功能
  • ISLM中全新的一键开启（Turnkey）功能
  • ISLM中支持的新框架-生成式 AI （Generative AI)
  • 情况管理的新用例31N
  • 使用自定义对象创建情况对象
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408中开放Beta功能测试的AI应用（链接）

更多详情可以参考链接

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD)

在本篇博客中，将会重点展示在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408 当中RASD版块更新的内容，将会覆盖以下话题内容：

  • 已使用对象
  • 后继Companion
  • CDS Comparator

更多详情可以参考链接。

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：供应链管理和质量管理

在SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408版本中，供应链管理板块从库存管理、库存盘点、订单承诺，质量管理从FMEA、缺陷管理、质量通知几大内容进行功能更新，具体可查看Blog：SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：供应链管理和质量管理。

库存管理 – 管理库存盘点应用

在2408版本中，管理库存盘点应用盘点计数现已支持下载-上载选项，即为盘点计数下载/上载excel，更方便的对盘点计数进行结果录入，且下载的excel会基于盘点凭证中的条目和物料进行对应显示。如使用第三方仓库的客户可以轻松地为其仓库工作人员提供打印输出，完成纸质库存盘点流程后，可将结果以 Excel 文件形式上载回系统，面对盘点计数数据量大的情况可以更方便快捷的进行系统操作。

库存管理 – 库存类型

2408库存管理板块的库存转储应用现支持多种库存类型以及不同的特殊库存类型，详见下方图表，蓝色部分是2408版本库存管理应用新增支持的库存类型和特殊库存类型。

质量管理-高级变式配置和质量管理的集成

在2408版本中，高级变式配置（advanced variant configuration）现已和质量管理板块有集成了，可以按配置激活质量检验。具体为质量检验中的高级变式配置 (AVC) 与检验批次的集成，可将销售订单或采购订单配置中指定的特征传输到检验批次的检验特征，通过简化流程，提高使用 AVC 和质量管理的客户的整体效率。

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：制造

在SAP 公有云2408版本发布之际，制造板块从生产工程、生产计划、生产执行都迎来了一些新的变化，覆盖了可扩展性、用户体验、新功能等重大更新。

监控物料覆盖：

当您对物料运行MRP计划后，系统对于MRP元素有些建议操作，以确保按计划覆盖需求。这些建议是以附加列的形式在“监控物料覆盖范围 - 净细分”和“监控物料覆盖范围 - 净值和单个细分”应用中显示，其中包括重新计划建议的数量。在以往的版本中，该列信息是需要在激活新功能的配置应用中激活后才能显示，从2408版本开始，无需激活即可使用该功能了。

更多精彩内容，请访问制造Blog：

生产工程和生产工序：

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：制造（生产工程... - SAP Community

生产计划：

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：制造（生产计划... - SAP Community

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：寻源和采购管理

2408版本比较大的变动是产品寻源相关的项目范围已弃用，但是也列出了很多新功能。当新版本发布之后，激活相关配置则可以实现采购合同的版本管理。当更改并发布已批准或已拒绝采购合同的版本相关字段时，将自动创建新版本。

您现在还可以通过采购申请项目创建具有自定义凭证类型的采购订单。

更多详细内容可以参考博客SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：寻源和采购话题 - SAP Community

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：销售

本篇文章重点展示在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408版本中，销售板块发布的新增功能，将覆盖以下主题内容

  • 显示更改日志-销售凭证
  • 批量维护价格条件记录
  • 优化开票凭证打印呈现
  • 基于权限的价格访问-销售合同
  • 灵活行项目决定增强
  • 管理客户退货-版本2
  • 管理贷项/借项凭证请求-版本2增强

显示更改日志-销售凭证

企业销售经理经常需要跟踪和分析各种销售凭证的更改，例如销售报价、销售合同、销售订单和退货订单。过去他必须在各个销售凭证之间切换以访问其更改日志，这既耗时又容易出错，特别是在处理大量凭证时。

2408版本更新后APP：显示更改日志-销售凭证，现在可以在一个地方监控各种销售凭证的更改。该APP为每次更改提供了用户体验友好的描述，使销售经理更容易理解和分析数据。配备了复杂的过滤选项，可以根据合作伙伴功能、条件类型、字段名称和售达方等标准快速地优化搜索。

 

批量维护价格条件记录

由于宏观市场通胀，客户需要根据一定的规律批量调整产品价格。

或者有部分产品价格即将到期，客户需要为其延长有效期。

更多详细内容可以参考博客：

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408亮点前瞻：销售话题 - SAP Community

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：财务

本篇文章重点展示在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408版本中，财务板块发布的新增功能，将覆盖以下主题内容

  • “过账资产重估”应用       
  • 数据修复工具           
  • 含业务交易类型的新自动调整过账场景   
  • 切换到管理日记账分录（新版本）           
  • 管理运营总账科目   
  • 即将发生的从快速启动板中搜索日记账分录的更改
  • 在财务会计里打印客户发票           
  • 成本中心审核手册               
  • 在“管理过账期间”应用中显示变更日志           
  • 删除自动科目确定中的内容           
  • 余额验证中的 QTD 度量    
  • 实际成本的CDS View发布           

！！！过账资产重估”应用 （Post Asset Revaluation）

使用新的“过账资产重估”应用 (F7775)，您可以手动过账重估。新的重估应用使您能够使用重置价值（即与购置和生产成本不同）重估资产。例如，您可以执行重估以将市场价值原则应用于资产会计。新应用将替换之前的应用“过账资产重估” (ABAWL) 。之前的应用已弃用。之前的 ABAWL 应用使用资产交易类型。交易类型确定如何重估资产，例如，891 “上一年度重估（向下）”、897 “当前年度重估（向下）”。在进一步处理期间必须记住这些内容。但是，在新应用中，您可以在过账之前直接指定相应的参数。因此，无法再使用不同的交易类型区分不同的重估。而是使用新的业务交易类型概念。

新应用提供了与“管理固定资产”应用的更好集成：“在管理固定资产”应用中，您可以选择资产并跳转到新的重估应用。重估过账后，您可以导航回“管理固定资产”应用并检查资产值。

新应用在以下业务目录中可用：

业务目录，名称

业务目录，技术名称

“资产会计 - 资产重估”

SAP_FIN_BC_AA_REVAL_PC

更多详细内容可以参考博客：

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻: 财务话题

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：用户体验

从2408版本开始，空间和页面（Spaces and Pages）将正式成为全新的UI界面展示方式，旧的分组（Group）模式将退出历史舞台。

更多详细内容可参考以下博客：

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408亮点前瞻：用户体验（User Experience）

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：技术话题

在之前的版本中，我们会在不同的文档链接中发布那些已更改、已删除、已弃用或新的扩展对象，比如CDS视图、API、业务对象接口等等。

现在，我们将在一个统一的链接里公布所有的扩展对象的更新，你可以使用不同的过滤器查看你感兴趣的更新。

该链接会始终打开最新版本的内容https://help.sap.com/S4_CE_CHANGES_EXT_OBJ

更多详细内容可参考以下博客：

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408亮点前瞻：技术话题（Technology Cross Topics）

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 亮点前瞻：EPPM

管理项目需求-预留物料

项目采购负责人可以从项目库存计划和预留物料

项目管理者与仓储人员通过预留凭证观察项目物料请求与发货数量

使用API复制创建项目

现有的API：Enterprise Project增强了复制功能，允许参考现有项目复制创建新的项目，生成具有自动调整计划日期的项目结构，可选复制项目需求和结算规则。

更多详细内容可参考以下博客：

entry.title: Re: ABAP RAP - Service binding issue - no data when launching ADT preview for a node
entry.content:
Hi,

If you're reading this, I faced the same issue as you, and it did work after commenting  "sort".

But I was curious why a function like sort would cause any issue. So, I re-checked my code (metadata extension) and found that in Sort I was giving Sort Order by TravelID, whereas the element name is TravelId (lowercase d). with this change I was able to fix the issue and the app is now running with sort. I recommend anyone facing the issue recheck the element names with the CDS fields.

Regards,

N'vn

entry.title: How to split files dynamically in SAP CPI?
entry.content:
Hello,

I am now testing "General Splitter" function in integration flow.
The scenario is very simple. We read file from a FTP server, and we do process splitter function, finally we pass the split file to 5 different folders in different FTP servers.

Suppose there's a CSV file with 10 rows being split, and we set up Line Break in the set up of General Splitter as "2", so we expect that there will be 5 files(=10/2) generated as the result of the process.
In this case, how do we assign which split file (there are 5 of them) goes to which FTP server? I suppose we should do the setting in the adapter?

And in the first place, without using Router (which we do not think should be used because we have to set up condition), there is no way for us to connect splitter to end message event and the receiver connected to end message event.
Furthermore, if we do not know how many rows there are in the input CSV file, meaning we do not know how many files will be split as the output, how do we do this kind of dynamical setting for general splitter and receiver adapter?

Thank you in advance.

Shin

entry.title: How to implement a Empty Value Check in Integration Flow
entry.content:
Hello,

I am now trying to create an integration flow with embedded value check function for mandatory fields, especially for CSV files.
For example, suppose there's an input CSV file as follow, and all three fields(Name, Cost, Category) should always be set as mandatory, meaning there should always be any value other than blank.

------------CSV File Image-----------
Name, Cost, Category
Apple, 80, Fruit
Banana, 50, Fruit
Milk, 40, Grocery
------------CSV File Image-----------

Therefore, if a CSV file as follow was input from the sender, after the process of integration flow, the status of it should show "Failed" because there's blank value (or Null) in the first row, for Category.


++++++++Bad CSV File Input++++++++
Name, Cost, Category
Apple, 80,
Banana, 50, Fruit
Milk, 40, Grocery
++++++++Bad CSV File Input++++++++

To achieve this scenario, I have designed an integration flow as below.

Here's the detail setting in message mapping.

Here's the detail setting for "Set Cost" content modifier.

Here's the detail for Router.

Here's the "Throw Error Message"(Content Modifier).

My thought was that we generate some message saying "Error" which was defined ourselves in message mapping, and the message replace empty values(in this case, the first row, for category). After that, we use Router to check if there's any "Error" values, if yes, then it will be routed to error end event.

However, it still shows error somehow, and I do not feel like it is a smart way to check empty values.
In this SAP learning tutorial[LINK], it mentions that this kind of checking falls into category as expected error handling, but it does not explain the best practice of how we could design in integration flows.

Could anyone please kindly advise on this one? It would be nice to paste a screenshot of integration flow.

 

Thank you.

 

Shin

https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-sap/managing-exclusions-when-publishing-back-to-employee-central/ba-p/13427048

Basically make a lookup table with the list of UserIDs you want to exclude. (or by country or any other criteria). Assign an event reason that doesn't exist to them.

I believe it will skip the Merit publish back but still publish the Bonus part.

 

Kindly let me know your findings.

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: SAP Signavio Process Transformation Suite
entry.content:
As organizations navigate through the complexities that hinder them from transforming their business processes, it is key to understand that a holistic business process transformation has to include 3 key components:

  • technology or solutions,
  • methodology
  • content and best practices

Here's where SAP Signavio can be a game changer. From offering a complete suite to support business transformation (SAP Signavio Transformation Suite), providing transformation methodology, and also providing a collection of ready to use value accelerators that will guide organizations along the transformation journey. 

SAP Signavio Process Transformation Suite is an end-to-end process management solution that gives companies the ability  to understand, improve, and transform all their business processes – fast and at scale. 

Here's a quick watch that can help you to understand how SAP Signavio supports business process transformations.

entry.title: GRC Tuesdays: Rising with SAP and the Three Lines (of Defense) Model
entry.content:
I’ve already described in a recent GRC Tuesdays blog post the RISE with SAP program and how Governance, Risk, and Compliance & Security augments it, so I won’t go over this again. But I have good news to share today: if relevance of GRC within this SAP initiative wasn’t clear enough, it has been made even more prominent with the announcement in April of a GRC package for RISE with SAP: The three lines of defense package

 

What is it?

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud for financial three lines of defense is an existing offering that has now been included in the RISE program to help SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition customers shift to remote, continuous, and risk-adjusted management to drive down risk and compliance costs while building trust.

By embedding the integrated solutions for three lines model into the very foundation of their SAP software landscape, organizations can automate tasks and decision-making, gain real-time visibility on their compliance status, and equip their people to anticipate and respond to the risks standing in the way of achieving business objectives.

 

Why is SAP doing this?

 

Well, quite simply because more and more organizations are requesting commercially packaged solutions to help them address the following trends:

 

30%

 

increase in cost of compliance expected by companies

90% of compliance leaders expect evolving business, regulatory, and customer demands to increase compliance-related operating costs by up to 30%

Find calm in every compliance storm, Accenture, May 2022

75%

of companies to increase risk management spend

3 out of 4 of companies are planning to increase spend across data analytics (75%), process automation (74%), and technology (72%) to support the detection and monitoring of risks

2022 Global Risk Survey, PwC, 2022

50%

of companies to automate controls

50% of organizations aim to automate controls monitoring and management capabilities to address core drivers of GRC strategy in 2023

GRC State of the Market 2023 – Benchmark Research Report, SAP Insider, 2023

38%

of organizations can identify risks before it is too late to take action on them

Executive Leadership: Strategic Risk Management Primer for 2023, Gartner, 2023

 

What’s in the scope?

 

To help companies manage enterprise risks, regulatory compliance, and audit activities efficiently and effectively, SAP S/4HANA Cloud for financial three lines of defense includes the following SAP GRC products:

SAP Process Control

 

 

This internal control and compliance tool enables organizations to achieve compliance and business process performance goals, while keeping their GRC program costs under control.

  • Find problems faster and easier through continuous control monitoring and automated testing
  • Easily adapt and scale with robust functionality and configurable options, increasing user productivity
  • Access a single source of truth with a unified framework and processes, minimizing duplication of efforts
  • Reduce costs using configurable, interactive email-delivered forms for business users, eliminating costly training
  • Improve accountability and problem tracking with workflow-driven evaluations and issue resolution

SAP Risk Management

 

 

This enterprise risk management solution supports companies to scan the horizon for emerging risks and opportunities, and preserve the value of the organization by minimizing unnecessary losses.

  • Define and configure business value drivers and objectives
  • Provide insight into how risks and controls can be optimized to meet strategic objectives
  • Balance acceptable residual risk with the cost of control and compliance
  • Continuously survey and assess emerging risks and opportunities
  • Continuously monitor risk levels, risk drivers, and risk indicators

SAP Audit Management

 


 

The internal audit module helps organizations provide independent assurance of risk and compliance standards to management and audit committees by leveraging real-time audit insights.

  • Improve audit quality, resource management, and scheduling for cost-effective operations
  • Prioritize audits more effectively using technology-driven risk inputs
  • Achieve comprehensive audit insights and standardized approaches across the enterprise
  • Enhance staff efficiency with self-service access to audit data
  • Quickly collect audit evidence using mobile tools and drag-and-drop features

In addition to being a commercial package, these solutions are of course natively interconnected – and also integrated to RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition – so that information can flow from the source system to 1st to the 2nd and 3rd line, and then to Management and Governing Bodies seamlessly:

Benefiting from additional innovations for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition, this package enables customers to: ​

  • Establish clear responsibilities and collaboration across all three lines
  • Automate key control and risk management activities
  • Identify and mitigate compliance issues
  • Facilitate audit engagement and improve audit performance
  • Improve business performance and decrease the cost and effort of managing GRC activities with a single-source of truth
  • Integrate with SAP ECC, SAP S/4HANA, SAP Signavio, etc. to automate continuous control and risk monitoring

 

Looking for more information?

 

If you’d like to read more about this package and its components, then have a look at the following links:

  • Overview video: Integrated Risk and Controls Management for SAP S/4HANA
  • Individual product pages: SAP Process Control, SAP Risk Management and SAP Audit Management

I look forward to reading your thoughts and comments either on this blog or on Twitter @TFrenehard.

And if you are interested in learning more about SAP solutions for Governance, Risk, and Compliance, feel free to fill-in the demo request form!

entry.title: Re: An eligibility rule for unique solution in SAP SuccessFactors Compensation
entry.content:
Hi @MSTan 

Thanks for sharing this setup (and love the use of the variable)

Another way to build it for this same requirement which wouldn't require to look for the needle in the haystack inside the Variable would be to base the eligibility on an MDF object (non-effective dated) and use import/export to mass update the userIDs. This way whenever the customer wants to make changes they get a CSV with one row per UserID and can easily do V lookups.

Only drawback of this alternate solution is that it takes a bit longer when applying the rule in SuccessFactors (variables are processed very quickly) but it may be a bit easier in case changes are needed and the administrator is not skilled at Excel.

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Re: API: Journal Entry – Clearing (Asynchronous) 問題請教
entry.content:
您好，
大概需要调用的API和流程是这样的：
Journal Entry - Post (Asynchronous)过账生成挂账AR财务凭证
Journal Entry - Post Confirmation (Asynchronous) 获得生成的财务凭证号
凭证1：
Dr Bank
 Cr AR （行项目2）
Operational Journal Entry Item - Read (A2X) 读取需要清账的AR凭证号和行项目号
凭证2
DR AR (行项目1）
 CR tax
 Cr Revenue
 
Journal Entry – Clearing (Asynchronous)做两个凭证行项目的清账
<APARItems>
<AccountingDocument>凭证2的凭证号</AccountingDocument>
 <AccountingDocumentItem>1</AccountingDocumentItem>
</APARItems>
<APARItems>
<AccountingDocument>凭证1的凭证号</AccountingDocument>
 <AccountingDocumentItem>2</AccountingDocumentItem>
</APARItems>
 
您的payload中只有一个凭证号和行项目
所以提示无法清账，余额过大无法自动更正。
 
Regards,
 
Sen
